Privacy Policy Summary

We collect ZERO personal data.

  • ✓ All calculations run in your browser only
  • ✓ Nothing is sent to external servers
  • ✓ No analytics or tracking code
  • ✓ No cookies, localStorage, or database storage
  • ✓ Your military data stays on your device
  • ✓ You control all exports and prints

Accessibility

This Tool meets Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level AA standards:

  • ✓ Full keyboard navigation (Tab, Enter, Escape)
  • ✓ Screen reader compatible (NVDA, JAWS, VoiceOver)
  • ✓ High contrast text and color-blind safe
  • ✓ Responsive design on mobile/tablet
  • ✓ Resizable text and browser zoom support

MARINE CORPS BASIC PAY COMPARISON

by Semper Admin - Dual-PEBD Month-by-Month Pay Difference

Companion to the Semper Admin PEBD Calculator

⚠️ OFFICIAL USE NOTICE

This tool produces estimates for administrative review. Official pay determinations require validation through DFAS and proper Marine Corps channels. Do not input classified or sensitive personal information.

Method. Synthetic 30-day months for all proration, February included. Day 31 never generates pay. YOS increases on the PEBD anniversary. Any change in either scenario splits both, so day counts match on every row.

👤 MEMBER INFORMATION

The PEBD past pay was computed under
The corrected PEBD from the PEBD Calculator
Pay starts on this exact date, not the first of the month
Fills both PEBD fields from a PEBD_Export file. Review before calculating.

📋 CAREER TIMELINE

One row per rank held, chronological, inclusive dates. Use the exact pay-table rank code, O1E and O2E and O3E included where they apply. The timeline must cover the full calculation period.

Row Rank Code Start Date End Date Actions

Follow Semper Admin on all platforms: https://linktr.ee/semperadmin

⚠️ Not for official use: Pay estimates only. Always verify against official pay records (LES, Master Military Pay Account) and contact your PAC or DFAS for official pay determinations.

Total Pay - Scenario B
Net Difference B minus A
